headline: Stocks Supported by Strong Earnings and AI Optimism

headline: Tyler Technologies, Inc. Announces Proposed Offering of Convertible Senior Notes Due 2031
summary: PLANO, Texas, May 11, 2026--Tyler Technologies announces proposed offering of convertible senior notes due 2031.
